description: CompositionBlack kurta made of blended fabric, has a split neckline, three quarter sleeves with lace detailing along the hems, sequins and beading around the neck and a vented hemFitRegularWash careWash separately in cold water using a mild detergentCrafted from soft fabric, this kurta from aneri is sure to offer exemplary comfort. Team it with leggings, sandals and chunky ethnic earrings.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
